titles.title: Alive and breathing (What holds your heart)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v12 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: What holds your heart, What stirs your soul, What matters come to mind.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The cares you keep, The thoughts you think, It's not all wasted time, Seek and you will find.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Joy still comes in the morning, Hope still walks with the hurting, If you're still alive and breathing, Praise the Lord!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Don't stop dancing and dreaming, There's still Good News worth repeating, So lift your head and keep singing, Praise the Lord!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Years roll by, We wonder why, We lost our way from home.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Our Father finds, The child inside, We had left for growing old, Awake, awake, Awake my soul.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Joy still comes in the morning, Hope still walks with the hurting, If you're still alive and breathing, Praise the Lord!

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Don't stop dancing and dreaming, There's still Good News worth repeating, So lift your head and keep singing Praise the Lord!

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Let everything, let everything, Let everything Praise the Lord!

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: In the working, In the waiting, Praise the Lord!

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: In the blessing, In the breaking, Come on, Praise the Lord!

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: In the dying, The rising, Let it praise the Lord, Let it praise the Lord. Praise the Lord!
